title: Immunization and vaccine awareness poster: Be a champion - Canada.ca
content:
## Immunization and vaccine awareness poster: Be a champion
Be a champion. Get vaccinated.
Vaccines help you win the fight against diseases.
To learn how vaccines can make you a champion visit Canada.ca/Vaccines .
Download the alternative format (PDF format, 1.32MB, 1 page)
Organization: Public Health Agency of Canada
Date published: 2016-04
- Immunization and vaccines
